name: Jiangsu Jiuding New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Jiuding New Material Co.,Ltd. produces and sells glass fiber yarn, fabrics, and FRP products in China. Its fiberglass products include building materials, such as EIFS and wall reinforcement, roofing waterproof, and stone reinforcement products; continuous filament mat; knitted fabrics for chopped strands mats and veil; woven roving for boats body, sports mechanics, military, automotive, etc.; fiberglass joint tapes; fiberglass alkaline-resistant mesh; and roving for wind turbine blades, high-pressure pipes, pressure cylinders, pultrusion, filament winding, and weaving applications. The company also offers e-glass fiber grinding wheel reinforced mesh, e-glass fiber wheel reinforced mesh, e-glass fiberglass yarns and rovings, e-glass fiber cloth, aluminum water filter base fabric, and high silica mesh and fabric for insulation, corrosion resistance, heat resistance, reinforcement, and other use. In addition, it provides pultrusion profile, a composite material for cooling tower, infrastructure, electricity insulation, chemical industry, and industrial and consumer goods applications; grille, a structural plate; and chemical environment protection equipment. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries, including North America, Europe, Southeast Asia, Japan, and South Korea. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Jiuding Group. Jiangsu Jiuding New Material Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Rugao, China.
